message:
fp-io: add JSON orient=index read/write path (bd-15ly)

Implement orient='index' support in fp-io JSON IO so index-labeled row objects round-trip without fallback transformations.

Details:

- Add JsonOrient::Index to read_json_str/write_json_string dispatch.

- Read path: parse top-level object-of-objects, derive IndexLabel from row keys (Int64 when parseable, otherwise Utf8), and null-fill sparse row objects across discovered columns.

- Write path: emit {index_label: {column: value}} objects and reject duplicate serialized index keys to avoid silent overwrite collisions.

- Add focused tests for round-trip, sparse null-fill semantics, non-object row rejection, and duplicate key rejection.

- Update FEATURE_PARITY.md notes to reflect records/columns/split/index JSON orient coverage in fp-io.
